problem id: 74e525f0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) AND SHR(1)) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10000110 -> 01001000
  01110110 -> 00100111
  11101110 -> 01101110
  01100000 -> 00000110
  01100010 -> 00100110
  10001110 -> 01001000
  01011101 -> 00000101
  10101010 -> 00001010
  01100001 -> 00010110
  11100101 -> 01011110

query: 10001100
predicted answer: 01001000
